calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-07-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, January 7, 2016 in Department 525:
Naim Nouar, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
Choudhery Corporation dba Pak Auto Service, Appellant/Defendant appears by Mubasher Choudhery/Corporation Officer with witness Jose Joecassisi.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Mr. Nouar testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - repair receipts

Mubasher Choudhery testifies on behalf of Choudhery Corporation and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) - Group exhibits: 7/21/2015 Pak Auto Service invoice, photos, and Stewart Chevrolet Cadillac service file.

Mr. Joecassisi testifies on behalf of Choudhery Corporation and responds to the questions from the Court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-25-2015 Granted With Continuance

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-25-2015 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-19-2015 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-15-2015 Continued To Oct-19-15 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
